zh.lifeSummary: 當Idoine Leybourne於大約1281年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親William de Leybourne41歲，母親Juliana de Sandwich28歲。她於1295年12月28日與Geoffrey de Saye在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年11月14日之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Idoine Leybourne于大约1281年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲William de Leybourne41岁，母亲Juliana de Sandwich28岁。她于1295年12月28日与Geoffrey de Saye在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年11月14日之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Idoine Leybourne was born about 1281, in Kent, England, her father, William de Leybourne, was 41 and her mother, Juliana de Sandwich, was 28. She married Geoffrey de Saye on 28 December 1295, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 14 November 1337, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Idoine Leybourne est née environ 1281, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, William de Leybourne, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Sandwich, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Saye le 28 décembre 1295, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 14 novembre 1337, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Idoine Leybourne um 1281 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Leybourne 41 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Sandwich 28. Sie hat am 28. Dezember 1295 in Essex, England Geoffrey de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 14. November 1337 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Idoine Leybourne è nata il circa 1281 nel Kent, England, sua padre, William de Leybourne, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Sandwich, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Saye il 28 dicembre 1295, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 14 novembre 1337, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Idoine Leybourneが約1281年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父William de Leybourneは41歳，母Juliana de Sandwichは28歳であった。1295年12月28日にイギリスエセックスでGeoffrey de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年11月14日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Idoine Leybourne(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Leybourne(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Sandwich(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1295년 12월 28일 영국 에세스에서 Geoffrey de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 11월 14일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Idoine Leybourne nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Leybourne, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Sandwich, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Saye em 28 de dezembro de 1295, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 14 de novembro de 1337, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Idoine Leybourne родилась около 1281 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Leybourne было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Sandwich, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Saye 28 декабря 1295 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 14 ноябрь 1337 г. в её родном городе.

sm.about 1281–after 14 November 1337: e tusa o le 1281–ina ua ma'ea le 14 Novema 1337

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Idoine Leybourne nació aproximadamente 1281, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Leybourne, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Juliana de Sandwich, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Geoffrey de Saye el 28 de diciembre de 1295, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 14 de noviembre de 1337, en su pueblo.
